GUARD.notes: UNBLOCKED C4345. Audit #330: review docs/migration/nginx/janicka-shop.conf (repo copy of /etc/nginx/sites-available/janicka-shop.conf on kryxon). Check: (1) security headers (HSTS pending SSL but scaffold ready, X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, CSP with frame-src comgate.eu per Comgate inline gate 504×679px spec, Permissions-Policy); (2) server_tokens off; (3) rate limiting on /api/auth + /api/dev-chat (limit_req_zone, e.g. 10r/s); (4) 20M body cap scoped to /api/uploadthing* only, default 1M elsewhere; (5) proxy header sanitization — strip incoming X-Forwarded-*, set trusted values server-side via real_ip_header; (6) TLS hardening checklist ready (TLS 1.2+ only, HSTS max-age=63072000 includeSubDomains preload, OCSP stapling, ssl_session_cache) for when certbot runs post-DNS-flip. Deliverable: findings list + concrete diff suggestions in docs/migration/nginx/nginx-hardening-review.md.
